name: hrzmed_wss
description: Node.js WebSocket server behind Nginx with Let's Encrypt

scripts.test:unit: node --test --test-force-exit tests/auth.test.js tests/ecgValidator.test.js tests/signalCompressor.test.js tests/persistence.test.js tests/monitoring.test.js
scripts.test:coverage:unit: c8 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --report-dir=coverage node --test --test-force-exit tests/auth.test.js tests/ecgValidator.test.js tests/signalCompressor.test.js tests/persistence.test.js
scripts.lint:report: mkdir -p reports && eslint . --ext .js --format json --output-file reports/eslint-report.json || true
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run test:unit

author: Jose Granados
